room_style.style_description: The room embodies a soft contemporary aesthetic, characterized by clean lines, plush upholstery, and a soothing neutral color palette. Medium-toned wood flooring and matching cabinetry add warmth, perfectly complementing the beige and taupe textiles. The symmetrical layout and distinct functional zones create a highly organized yet deeply inviting atmosphere.

detailed_objects.name: Armchair_North
detailed_objects.description: A plush, light beige fabric armchair with a square design, angled towards the center of the lounge area.

detailed_objects.name: Armchair_South
detailed_objects.description: A plush, light beige fabric armchair with a square design, angled towards the center of the lounge area to mirror the opposite chair.

detailed_objects.name: Side_Table
detailed_objects.description: A small, square side table made of light brown wood. It has a single white rectangular object, possibly a book, resting in the center of its surface.

detailed_objects.name: Floor_Lamp
detailed_objects.color_description: warm white glow with brass/gold accents
detailed_objects.description: A modern floor lamp with a circular, glowing warm white shade and metallic accents, positioned in the corner.

detailed_objects.name: Bed
detailed_objects.color_description: white bedding, taupe pillows and throw, light beige headboard
detailed_objects.description: A large bed with a light beige upholstered headboard, dressed in white linens with taupe pillows and a matching folded throw blanket across the foot.

detailed_objects.name: Nightstand_North
detailed_objects.description: A rectangular light brown wood nightstand. On its surface sits a circular glowing table lamp and a small dark rectangular object.

detailed_objects.name: Nightstand_South
detailed_objects.description: A rectangular light brown wood nightstand featuring a circular glowing table lamp and a small dark item on its top surface.

detailed_objects.name: Bench
detailed_objects.color_description: light beige with a taupe blanket
detailed_objects.description: A rectangular upholstered bench in a light beige color, featuring a darker taupe blanket draped over its right side.

detailed_objects.name: Media_Console
detailed_objects.description: A long, rectangular media console made of greyish-brown wood. Its top surface holds a small cluster of dark decorative objects, including what appears to be a sculpture and a small book or tray.

detailed_objects.name: Plant
detailed_objects.color_description: green leaves in a dark grey pot
detailed_objects.description: A bushy green potted plant sitting in a dark grey, circular planter in the corner of the room.

detailed_objects.name: Wardrobe_East
detailed_objects.description: A large, open wardrobe system made of greyish-brown wood, featuring hanging rails with visible clothing and shelving units.

detailed_objects.name: Wardrobe_North
detailed_objects.description: An open wooden wardrobe unit in a greyish-brown finish, displaying hanging clothes on a rail.

detailed_objects.name: Closet_Bench
detailed_objects.description: A long, narrow wooden bench in the center of the closet. On its surface, there is a round object, possibly a hat box, and a small dark rectangular item.

detailed_objects.name: Dresser
detailed_objects.description: A rectangular wooden dresser in a greyish-brown finish. Its top surface holds a small cluster of items, appearing to be bottles or cosmetics, arranged near the right edge.

detailed_objects.name: Floor_Mirror
detailed_objects.color_description: reflective surface with a brown frame
detailed_objects.description: A large, rectangular floor mirror with a simple brown wooden frame, positioned in the corner of the closet.

detailed_objects.name: Orphan_obj_004_Book
detailed_objects.description: A small white book placed on top of the side table between the two armchairs in the lounge area.

detailed_objects.name: Orphan_obj_009_Table_Lamp_North
detailed_objects.description: A glowing table lamp resting on the north nightstand next to the bed.

detailed_objects.name: Orphan_obj_012_Table_Lamp_South
detailed_objects.description: A glowing table lamp resting on the south nightstand next to the bed.

detailed_objects.name: Orphan_obj_017_Decor_Item_Console
detailed_objects.description: Small decorative items placed on top of the media console at the bottom of the main bedroom area.
